attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROJECT_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROJECT_SEGMENT, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROJECT_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PARENT_PROGRAM, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROJECT_MGR, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.DEPARTMENT_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.SUMMARY_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.GES_PK_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROJECT_NAME_20, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS,
 (
 select  PROJECT_ID ,PROJECT_SEGMENT,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS
 minus
 select  PROJECT_ID ,PROJECT_SEGMENT,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PROJECT_ID = STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROJECT_ID and ACM.PROJECT_SEGMENT=STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.PROJECT_SEGMENT 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFI_GL_PROJECTS)
